name: Sophia Li
shortBio: Covers Shanghai and Suzhou with an eye for district texture, architecture, style, food culture, and softer urban pacing.
fullBio: Sophia Li is a Shanghai-based features editor at China Travel Notes. She leads Shanghai and Suzhou coverage, especially stories where architecture, neighborhood rhythm, food culture, design, and city mood all need to be read together. Her work aims to make East China feel more lived-in and less like a skyline checklist.
reviewProcess: Sophia reviews pages for neighborhood clarity, walkability, atmosphere, and whether a district or place still gives better value than a more obvious but less distinctive stop.
seoDescription: Read Shanghai and Suzhou guides and editorial features by Sophia Li at China Travel Notes.
